description.content: NFT methods — ownership, metadata, holders, and transfer history.
Returns the full list of NFTs owned by a wallet address across supported chains.
Returns metadata for a specific NFT (token contract + token ID).
Returns the holders of a specific NFT contract.
Returns the transfer history of a specific NFT contract or wallet.
Token methods — balances, prices, holders, currencies, and transfers.
Returns the native and ERC-20 balances for a wallet address across supported chains.
Returns the catalog of currencies supported by a given blockchain.
Returns the current USD price of a token (native or ERC-20) on a given chain.
Returns historical pricing data for a token over a specified time window.
Returns the list of holders for an ERC-20 token contract.
Returns the total count of holders for an ERC-20 token contract.
Returns ERC-20 token transfer history for a wallet address or token contract.
Query methods — blockchain statistics, blocks, logs, transactions, interactions.
Returns aggregate statistics about supported blockchains.
Returns full block information for a range of block heights.
Returns event logs from a specified block range.
Returns the full transaction details for the supplied transaction hash.
Returns the full transaction history for a wallet address.
Returns the chains a wallet has interacted with (cross-chain activity index).

The Ankr Advanced API (AAPI) provides a specifically-tailored collection of JSON-RPC
methods that optimize, index, cache, and store blockchain data across multiple
EVM-compatible blockchains. The Advanced API exposes three logical groups:
NFT, Token, and Query.


Contact Support:
 Name: Ankr
 Email: support@ankr.com
